title: Ascended Roads
body:
# Ascended Roads

### RoadStuff 1.7.10 block texture port to 1.12.2 --- ### Disclaimer: I'm _really_ not a programmer, I can't _guarantee_ this mod won't brick your world, but It _should_ be safe. But, I figured there's _at least_ one other person out there who could benefit from me publishing this rather than keeping it private, no matter how incomplete it is. --- [Chisel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisel/files?version=1.12.2) **_is required for proper survival gameplay, as there are no crafting recipes for the block variants._** Known Bugs: - Slabs are currently pretty buggy as ""my"" code for it doesn't work very well, but I figured it was better to add the base variants than nothing at all. I recommend installing [LittleTiles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/littletiles) if textured slabs are mission-critical. **_At least it's not MCreator right?™_** If you would like to ~~rewrite~~ improve the mod, you can contact me on discord @symplistic (send the request twice so I know you're not a bot)
